since_last: 47% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.09%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 47% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -1.03% · Gold -0.11% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 47% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.09%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.09%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.91%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -5.97%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +3.28%, AVAV +3.27%, BIDU +3.16%, GOOGL +2.18%, WDAY +1.93%. Laggards: SKHY -5.97%, ARM -3.94%, TSM -3.36%, DELL -2.83%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.44% at $135.87
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
